charter_number.description: Maine SOS-assigned registration/charter number of an existing mark, used to identify which registration is being amended/cancelled/assigned. Distinct from filing-level identifiers; lives under mark.* per the MARK-1 namespace.

line1.description: 1. TEXT - word(s) protected in the original registration (line 1)
2. FEATURES - describe the design protected in the original registration (line 1)

type.description: Current type of an existing mark — values from MARK-1 §C: 'Trademark' | 'Service Mark' | 'Collective Mark'. On the amendment form this is captured as free text (single widget) rather than the checkbox group used elsewhere.

type_changed.description: Boolean indicating whether the type of mark is being amended (true = yes, the type indicated represents an amendment from that appearing on the original registration; false = no, type unchanged). Mapped onto a yes/no checkbox pair.

original_type_if_changed.description: Recital of the prior type-of-mark value when mark.type_changed=true. Free-text line above the yes/no checkbox pair.

type_change_explanation.description: Sub-question text field between the type-of-mark and the yes/no checkbox row (mark3Six widget). Likely a continuation/explanation prompt; tentative — confidence is low pending visual confirmation.

class_number.description: Single Nice classification class being added or deleted on a MARK-3 amendment.

class_action.description: Mutually-exclusive enum identifying whether the class is being 'added' or 'deleted'.

new_class_description.description: Description of goods/services for a newly added class on a MARK-3 amendment (only required when amendment.class_action='added').

manner_of_use.description: Description of how the mark is applied to goods or used in connection with services for a newly added class. Three-line widget primitive (Text13/14/15); synth concatenates non-empty lines.

additional_pages_attached.description: Boolean opt-in flagging that an additional-pages exhibit is attached (used for multi-class amendments since the form has only one inline class row).

entities.description: Entity name(s) the filing covers, as listed on the cover block.
